title: InPost (create add-on)
description: Transport items instantly between large distances with the new InPost block!
body:
**IMPORTANT: Please do not try transporting storage items (backpacks/create's packages etc.). It does NOT work yet! I'm sorry to any of you who lost items this way.**
This mod adds InPost to the game, so you can send items to your friends or transport items instantly to wherever you want as long as there is an InPost block there and it's in the same dimension. It can be crafted by surrounding a chest with gold ingots to make an InPost creator and shift right click with it on a create packager. The 5 slots on the left are the items sent to you. The slot in the middle is where you input the item you want to send. In the top 3 textfields input the coordinates (x y z) and the bottom textfield is for the slot you would like to send the item to. If the slot is filled or there isn't an InPost block at the coordinates the item will remain in your block. The mod create version 6.0.0 or higher is required to make the block, but if create is then removed this mod will still work. Since 1.2.0 you can also automate sending with the use of InPost Calibrators, items crafted like a chain, but diagonally and with gold instead. By right-clicking they can be set to any value up to 128000 including negatives. After powering the block with redstone it will read data from the calibrators (which need to be placed in the bottom right slots, which are x, y, z and slot from top to bottom) and send the items just as if you pressed the send button!
